## TagQueryOptions.ancestor property

Ancestor tag — transitive. A tag matches if any tag in its ancestor chain (parent, parent's parent, ...) has the given name or primary key. Accepts a single value or an array (any-of).

**Signature:**

```typescript
ancestor?: string | string[] | undefined;
```
